name: Stefano Corbellini
text: Very competent, friendly and professional. Dr. Menon cares deeply about her patients wellbeing and uses a personalized approach for best and long lasting results.

name: Helen Birney
text: I arrived at Menon with debilitating back pain from bulging and herniated discs. I was met with compassion, and suggestions for the least invasive pain relief possible, which they were able to administer that day.

name: Christopher Dillon
text: I've come to the millburn office on Essex st a few times to Dr. Menon for pain treatments. She does a great job getting me back on the golf course. Highly recommend anyone living in short hills, maplewood or millburn area with pain to pay her a visit.

name: Love Brooks
text: I came in with another one of my laser hair removal sessions with a new person and I loved it! Jennifer is an amazing person to get laser hair removal from. She was very careful with it. Jennifer made it feel like nothing. I used to be so nervous but now I love it!

name: Igor Katsnelson
text: As a physical therapist with over 10 years of experience, I've had the pleasure of referring many of my patients to Dr. Menon. I have complete trust in her expertise, and I'm always happy to hear how well my patients are taken care of.

name: Stephanie Dillon
text: I had a great experience at this office. The staff was friendly, professional, and efficient from the moment I walked in. Dr. Menon was attentive, knowledgeable, and explained everything perfectly! I highly recommend this office to anyone looking for quality care.

name: Juhi Mallik
text: I've been a regular at Menon's Regenerative Center, and Dr. Menon and the staff are absolutely amazing! Dr. Menon is incredibly knowledgeable and takes the time to understand my skin's needs, ensuring the best treatments every time.

name: Samipendra Chaudhury
text: I've been to Dr Menon multiple times for pain management and each visit reinforces that I'm in expert hands. Dr. Menon and her team are incredibly focused on diagnostic precision and creating a holistic recovery plan tailored to my needs.

name: Manny Pagan
text: I enjoy going to Doctor Menon. She's very patient and listens to your concerns. More importantly, she explains why she goes with certain natural methods to help you improve and feel better.

name: Dipanwita Das
text: I cannot recommend Menon Regen and their team highly enough! From the moment I stepped into their practice, I was greeted with warmth and professionalism. The office is impeccably clean and inviting, and the staff goes above and beyond.

name: Rucha Vaidya
text: Highly recommend Dr Menon and her staff. Dr Menon was extremely thorough with diagnosing my problem without rushing through the appointment and had an excellent follow up protocol. Menon Medispa's facilities are impeccably clean, and the entire team is very warm and knowledgeable.

name: Rathi Vijay
text: They have the best hydrafacials. Let me tell you, I've had facials before, but this was on another level. My skin felt like it had been reborn! The process was gentle yet thorough, and I could literally see the gunk being extracted.

name: Monika Anush
text: I have been a regular client of Menon Regenerative Institute since the very beginning. Dr. Menon is very knowledgeable and has always recommended the best treatments.

name: Sara Mangal
text: Great experience and lovely, accommodating staff!!

name: Yunna H
text: Dr. Menon has Midas hands. I have been her patient for almost 10 years. Her knowledge, care and bedside manners are impeccable. The office is a gem! Highly recommended!

name: Alexa Candelario
text: Jennifer is amazing. Her aura and energy makes you feel welcomed and comfortable. Love our sessions! And my girl Rose Marie, the receptionist, is just lovely! I always leave with great joy after seeing them.

name: Debbe French
text: Dr Aditi Menon is a very kind, caring & comprehensive physician. She helped me immensely with her knowledge & skills to diagnose & treat a variety of issues, especially at a critical time with a post-surgical complication!

name: Natalia Klobus
text: Amazing staff!!! So nice and professional. Their machine for laser hair removal does wonders with results in just one treatment. As prior tried bbl laser hair removal in another medspa and did not have any results.

name: Christina Carr
text: Cindy was amazing during my laser hair removal session, the whole staff is friendly and the office is nice and clean! I'm looking forward to my sessions, as well as some more treatments in the future.

name: MARY WILLIAMS
text: Dr Menon is wonderful. Best results I've had with Botox injections.

name: Laura Redding
text: I have been seeing Dr Menon for over a year. My shoulders and hips were so locked up. We then tried botox injection in my neck - OMG - its the first time in over a year I'm pain free. I literally cried tears of joy.

name: Anna Marie Graziano
text: If you're looking for a facial that delivers instant gratification without the 'scary' redness of a traditional chemical peel, the HydraFacial is basically the gold standard. I recently visited Menon Medispa, and it was well worth it.

name: LFGA
text: Wonderful experience! Went in for a facial treatment that really helped. Cindy was kind, knowledgeable, and recommended some great products that have gotten me the results I was looking for.

name: Renae Cianci
text: Lovely experience with Jennifer doing my glass skin PDRN facial.

name: Kathi Albanese
text: I had a wonderful skincare experience at Menon! It was my first visit, and Cindy was incredibly knowledgeable, gentle, and professional throughout the entire process. I received a HydraFacial paired with dermaplaning, and the results were amazing.

name: Yahaira Jimenez
text: Today was my first treatment for a exosome growth micro needling with Cindy and can not be more happy. She's amazing. She answered all my questions and made me feel comfortable and welcome.

name: Kosh Palmer
text: Cindy was brilliant and very knowledgeable. The spa was clean and impeccable. Booked my next appointment.

name: Mawunyo Fafa
text: I had an amazing experience with my treatment today! The whole process was quick, comfortable and professional. Dr. Menon took the time to explain everything thoroughly and made me feel completely at ease. My results look so natural.

name: Bev's Cleaning Pro's LLC
text: I had a wonderful experience. I did the ClearLift Laser treatment and my face hasn't looked so beautiful in a long time. I definitely will continue with my facial treatment. Very relaxing place and the staff is very welcoming.

name: Fiona Ahern
text: I love Dr. Menon and her staff, they are skilled, on time, so friendly and I love every service I have had there.

name: Liviana Biasini
text: It's a wonderful place and Dr. Menon and her staff is very friendly and professional. I would highly recommend this place. Jennifer is a gem and made me feel at ease throughout the appointment.

name: TAMMIEg. JONES
text: I received a HydraFacial at their Millburn NJ office a few times to help with my dry skin - Jennifer was excellent and the facial was very relaxing. The facility is very clean, has some parking out front.

name: Mary Jo Sperlazza
text: The Dr is amazing. Extremely knowledgeable and very personable and easy to talk to. She explains everything to you so you understand all procedures. Her front desk receptionist is so so helpful and very pleasant. The best office!

name: Charlene Watson
text: Dr. Menon is a top notch care giver and one of the best doctors I have ever been to. She really cares about her patients and never rushes you through a visit. She has a wonderful sense of humor and always puts me at ease.

name: Kristin Kabous
text: Sarah was amazing for my facial! She explained everything she was doing in the easiest terms to understand and also told me exactly what I was doing wrong and how to correct it. 10/10 for Sarah!!!

name: Heidi S
text: Absolutely loved getting a facial here!! Sarah is an amazing esthetician!! She made me comfortable and answered any of the questions I had. Would 100% recommend getting any of the facials they offer.
